templates.name: Simple Tracker

templates.description: Collect responses with a form and view aggregate results with charts.

templates.description: A journal for date-based entries â€” write, browse, and edit. Great for diaries, standups, or gratitude logs.

templates.description: Track scores and rankings for people or teams with charts and summary stats.

templates.description: Multiple-choice quiz with auto-stepping questions, scoring, and optional progress tracking.

templates.description: A searchable directory with card layout and detail view. Browse, search, and manage contacts or members.

templates.name: Inventory
templates.description: Track items, quantities, and locations. See stock levels at a glance with searchable lists, card layout, and low-stock alerts.

templates.description: A quick check-off list â€” add items, tap to check them off. Perfect for grocery lists, to-dos, and packing lists.

templates.name: Advanced Checklist
templates.description: Run checklists and inspections with pass/fail tracking, completion counts, and color-coded results.

templates.name: Master-Detail
templates.description: Two related tables â€” manage parent records and their child items. Great for projects & tasks, orders & line items, or classes & students.

templates.name: Booking / Sign-up

templates.name: Kanban Board
